title: FORGE Proposal IR
description: Intermediate Representation emitted by FORGE and consumed by Echelon's admission gate. Each ProposalEnvelope contains the full classification, one or more theatre proposals, provenance metadata, and optional composition context. Versioned for forward-compatibility. See spec/STABILITY.md for schema stability policy and breaking change commitments.

ir_version.description: Proposal IR schema version. Echelon MUST reject envelopes with unrecognised versions.

forge_version.description: FORGE semver that produced this envelope (e.g. '0.1.0').

emitted_at.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when FORGE emitted this envelope.

feed_id.description: Stable identifier for the data feed that was classified (e.g. 'usgs_m4.5_hour', 'swpc_goes_xray'). Echelon uses this for dedup and routing.

feed_profile.description: Complete 5-dimension classification (Q1-Q5). Echelon may use this for its own routing logic beyond what FORGE proposes.

source_metadata.description: Optional provenance about the feed source. Not used for matching — informational only.

trust_tier.description: FORGE trust tier for this source. String keys (T0-T3) represent oracle identity tiers, orthogonal to TREMOR's numeric data maturity levels. Echelon provenance mapping: T0/T1 → signal_initiated (T0 high confidence, T1 Brier-discounted), T2 → suggestion_promoted, T3 → suggestion_unlinked.

domain.description: Feed domain hint (e.g. 'seismic', 'space_weather', 'air_quality'). Caller-supplied, not classifier-inferred. Makes the envelope self-describing for Echelon routing.

event_count.description: Number of events in the classified window.

proposals.description: Ordered list of theatre proposals (highest confidence first). Empty array is valid — means FORGE found no viable templates for this feed.

composition.description: Present only when this envelope was produced by composing two feeds. Null for single-feed classification.

usefulness_scores.description: Optional map of proposal index → usefulness score (0-1). Populated when FORGE runs the economic filter.

classification.description: Q1: temporal cadence of the feed.
Q4: source density and network topology.

proposal_id.description: Deterministic ID: SHA-256 of `feed_id:template:JSON.stringify(sorted params)`, first 16 hex characters. Stable across polls for unchanged feeds. Use as dedup key.

template.description: Theatre template type. Must match a template registered in Echelon's theatre registry.

params.description: Template-specific parameters. Schema depends on template type. Echelon MAY override specific fields (e.g. settlement_source) at admission time.

confidence.description: FORGE confidence in this proposal (0-1). Echelon's admission gate may apply its own threshold.

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of why this template was proposed. Includes rule ID and traced_to references.

brier_type.description: Expected Brier scoring method for RLMF certificates from this theatre. Always present and never null — determined by template type. Mapping: cascade → multi_class (5-bucket resolution), all other templates (threshold_gate, divergence, regime_shift, anomaly, persistence) → binary. FORGE sets this from the BRIER_TYPE lookup in src/ir/emit.js; Echelon may rely on it for certificate validation.

usefulness_score.description: Economic usefulness score (0-1) for this individual proposal. Null when the economic filter was not invoked (score_usefulness=false). When present, matches the corresponding entry in the envelope-level usefulness_scores map.

feed_a_role.description: Semantic role of feed A in the composition (e.g. 'threshold_target').

feed_b_role.description: Semantic role of feed B in the composition (e.g. 'arrival_predictor').

aligned_pair_count.description: Number of temporally aligned event pairs used.
